texto: Most true happiness comes from one's inner life from the disposition of the mind and soul. Admittedly a good inner life is difficult to achieve especially in these trying times. It takes reflection and contemplation and self-discipline.
explicacao: Citação de W. L. Shirer sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Most true happiness comes from one's inner life from the disposition of the mind and soul. Admitt…” articula reflexao, happiness, inner em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
